_doc: Room-boundary bleed items identified in the M2 own-property run (3 Jul 2026).
The capture was one continuous 1080p walkthrough split into per-room segments
with stream copy, so each segment starts up to ~2s inside the PREVIOUS room;
the describe model itemised those lead frames into the wrong room's schedule.
Every entry below was verified against the extracted keyframes (see
Item ids refer to report/pristine/inventory.raw.json (frozen raw model output,
sha256 60398db6...) — the copy all evals score. The same ids were removed from
or moved within the reviewed report/inventory.json via the review loop.
Fixture use: when scoring the pristine copy against own-property gold labels,
hallucination_rate is reported twice — raw, and with the ids below excluded.
The raw number drives the ingest-escalation decision; the bleed-excluded
number gates the prompt-tuning exit (prompt work cannot fix an ingest fault).
No property photos are referenced here; names/ids only.

run.capture: 10-room segments from a single 13-minute 1080p walkthrough video

exclusions.name: Hallway sideboard/cabinet
exclusions.evidence: kitchen_f000009 is the hallway (walkthrough started there)

exclusions.name: Artificial plant
exclusions.covered_by: HAL-019 Faux tree in pot / HAL-021 Faux monstera plant

exclusions.name: Framed pictures
exclusions.covered_by: HAL-023 Framed forest photographic print / HAL-024 Framed photograph on sideboard

exclusions.evidence: same appliance, navy kitchen run (living_f000009 bleed + sight line)
